title: sonerila zeylanica var. pumila
intro: Sonerila zeylanica var. pumila, also known as the dwarf Sonerila or Pumila Sonerila, is a small, perennial plant species that belongs to the Sonerila genus of flowering plants. It is native to tropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Sonerila zeylanica var. pumila can be used as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
